title: Grid World Generator
description: Exactly 89.67% of the world is gone! Take this challenge and try thriving in a world where terrain is sparse, resources are scattered, and every block counts. Can you survive in the void between the grid?
body:
# 🌀 Grid World: The 89.67% Void Challenge

## What happens when almost the entire world disappears?
Welcome to Grid World, a bold and brutal terrain-modification challenge where only 10.33% of blocks survive world generation. This mod replaces nearly all natural terrain with air—leaving behind a sparse, lattice-like grid of blocks at 5-block intervals.

You’ll spawn into a world that’s eerily empty. The terrain is fractured. Biomes still exist, structures still generate, and mobs still spawn—but the land itself is mostly gone. What’s left is a minimal framework of blocks… and your creativity.

## 🌍 Features
- 🌫️ 89.67% of blocks replaced with air: It's a 3D grid!

- 🏰 Structures are untouched: Villages, temples, mineshafts, and other generated structures still appear as normal.

- 🧱 Sparse but consistent: The remaining blocks form a 3D grid you can use to navigate and build from.

- 🌱 Survival-focused: Trees, ores, and basic terrain features are drastically reduced—every resource is a rare find.

- 🧭 Compatible with most terrain mods: Should work with mods that don't completely override vanilla chunk generation.

## ✨ Inspiration
Minimal World is inspired by:

- Ray's Grid: a minimalist terrain concept with challenge-driven gameplay.

- SethBling’s SkyGrid: the original block-grid survival idea that redefined skyblock.

- This mod takes those inspirations and asks:
"What if the entire terrain obeyed the grid—and almost nothing else remained?"

## 🔧 Use Cases
- 💀 Hardcore survival challenges

- 🧠 Puzzle-like skyblock adventures

- 🛠️ Custom maps and modpacks

- 🌌 Minimalist creative worlds

## ⚠️ Tips Before You Play
- Resource scarcity is real. Expect to rely on structures for survival early on.

- Building bridges and platforms becomes essential—embrace creative movement.

- Try combining this mod with others to amplify the chaos or balance the difficulty.

- Multiplayer recommended for group survival chaos!

## 📦 Installation
Drop the mod into your /mods folder.

- ⚠️ This mod only supports Minecraft 1.21.5 & 1.21.6.

- ⚠️ Compatible only with **fabric** dedicated server.

- ✅ You can play multiplayer via the "Open to LAN" feature.

## 🌐 Fabric Dedicated Server Setup (Multiplayer)
- Get the Fabric server launcher from the [official site](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/)

- Place it where you want, then run it once to set things up

- Open the new `eula.txt` file and change `eula=false` to `eula=true`

- Download the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and drop it into the new mods folder

- Put [_this_](https://modrinth.com/project/wR7IjW4q) mod in the mods folder too

- Open `server.properties` and set `level-type=gridgen\:grid_world`

- If your server had a world before, delete the old world folder to start fresh!

## 💡 Modpack-Friendly & Lightweight
Minimal World is a lightweight, client-side terrain generation mod with no custom items or blocks—just clean, chaotic worldgen. Great as a foundation for challenge-based modpacks.

**Get ready to rebuild a world from (almost) nothing!**
